title: 有馬記念の後に・青に染む

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is over. Everyone gave it their all
in what turned out to be a turbulent race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But only one could rise above the rest. One
incomparable racer who no longer stood in the
shadow of any other...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I did it. I've returned as the first place finisher.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh my... Hehe. Are those tears I see?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Please, Trainer. You're far too easy to impress.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: We still haven't reached the top, after all.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: There's much more climbing yet to do!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I... really, really—I wanted to win... you know? Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I know.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Nghhh... Waaaahh!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you for not holding back against me, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Because I faced you today, I can keep pressing
forward.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So... when our paths cross again, let's compete
one more time.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Y-yes. Let's!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You know, I was going to go and challenge them to the Dream Trophy...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But it's no use... I don't think I can wait that long
to race these two!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Maybe I'll run in the Arima next year.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Cause seriously, this is what I've been waiting for
so, sooo long.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ugh, they're just too cute!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My path... our path continues with no end in
sight.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm still too clumsy and weak to say I've reached
the top.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But for today... just today...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I think I'll give myself a pat on the back.
choice_data_list: I've got tons of praise to give you!
I've got tons of praise to give you!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh... This is embarrassing to say, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...I'd like that.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Just for today, let me bask in the compliments. ♪
